channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk is hampering hurricane relief efforts—and using X to do it
item.description: When Federal Emergency Management Agency first responders raced to western North Carolina in the days after Hurricane Helene, they expected much of the devastation they found in its wake: totaled cars, crumbling roads, homes filled with mud or ruined by floodwaters or washed away entirely.
item.dc:creator: Jay Willis, Fast Company

item.title: Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation
item.description: The Pentagon has taken another big step forward to make CMMC a reality. DoD projects the requirements will start showing up in contracts by mid-2025. The post Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft unveils health care AI tools
item.description: Microsoft unveiled several new artificial intelligence (AI) tools on Thursday aiming to support health care organizations through medical imaging models, health care agent services and an AI-driven workflow solution for nurses.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Scully, The Hill

item.title: Hurricane Milton has caused thousands of flight cancellations, is yours one of them? What to know
item.description: Thousands of flights in and out of the U.S. have been canceled this week as Hurricane Milton barreled into the Gulf of Mexico and plowed across Florida.
item.dc:creator: Wyatte Grantham-Philips And David Koenig, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This privacy and compliance threat throws shade at iPhone Mirroring
item.description: Apple-focused IT admins using device management software should perhaps temporarily disable iPhone Mirroring across their device fleets to prevent inadvertent privacy or compliance challenges as a result of using the new macOS Sequoia feature. (Apple is supposed to be working on a fix already.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Astera Labs debuts Scorpio fabric switch to accelerate PCIe for AI, cloud
item.description: There’s a new type of switch that could soon be showing up in AI-optimized data centers, a PCIe 6 fabric switch. Astera Labs this week unveiled its new Scorpio fabric switch, which it says is the industry’s first PCIe 6 switch.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cloudera jockeys for AI platform prominence
item.description: While the big hyperscalers are fighting it out for dominance in the AI space, many enterprises are looking for alternatives. More than half (60%) of large companies have pulled some AI workloads from public clouds, according to a survey released this summer by Flexential.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Waiting for JD: Vance’s appearance at Silicon Valley fundraiser keeps nearby crowd on edge
item.description: Admissions to the event- the host was not clear - were going for up to $50,000 and the cheapest ticket costing $3,000.
item.dc:creator: Caelyn Pender, The Mercury News

item.title: Deno 2.0 arrives, ready to battle Node.js
item.description: Deno 2.0, a major update to the open source Deno runtime for JavaScript, TypeScript, and WebAssembly, is now available as a production release. It emphasizes backward compatibility with the rival Node.js runtime and NPM and a stabilized standard library.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google could be forced to sell parts of its business if the DOJ gets its way
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to force Google to sell parts of its business in order to eliminate its online search monopoly.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Lessons Learned from the CrowdStrike Outage: Enhancing Patch Management Practices
item.description: Understanding the impact of the July 2024 technology outage, strategies for driver testing and patch management systems planning are crucial to prevent future outages.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Gemini Code Assist Enterprise woos enterprise developers
item.description: Google Cloud has announced Gemini Code Assist Enterprise, billed as an enterprise-grade tool that lets developers generate or transform code that is more accurate and relevant to their applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to use your iPhone to get help by satellite
item.description: Apple’s decision to put satellite connections in iPhones is already saving lives, and as Hurricane Milton threatens Florida, now is the time for every US iPhone user to learn how the system works and why they should upgrade to iOS 18.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez promises 'brawl' if 'billionaires' force out Lina Khan
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) vowed Wednesday there would be a “brawl” if wealthy Democratic donors attempt to force Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan out of a potential Harris administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google scientists share Nobel Prize in chemistry for AI protein work
item.description: Two Google DeepMind scientists shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry with a US professor for their breakthrough research into proteins.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Microsoft wants Copilot to be your new AI best friend
item.description: “It’s great to see you!” Microsoft’s Copilot AI chatbot underwent a transformation last week, morphing into a simplified pastel-toned experience that encourages you…to just chat.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A close call with crafty scammer posing as Microsoft support
item.description: This scam uses Google search results to redirect you to scammers instead of Microsoft support. Here's what tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson has to say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Inflection AI shifts to Intel Gaudi 3, challenging Nvidia’s AI chip lead
item.description: Inflection AI is shifting its latest enterprise platform to Intel’s Gaudi 3 accelerators, stepping away from Nvidia GPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: California’s vetoed AI bill: Bullet dodged, but not for long
item.description: Artificial intelligence has the power to revolutionize industries, drive economic growth, and improve our quality of life. But like any powerful, widely available technology, AI also poses significant risks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: SAP Build gains AI capabilities to help build autonomous agents
item.description: SAP wants developers to view its Build platform as the one extension solution for all of SAP’s applications, according to Michael Aneling, chief product officer for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Titan's former lead engineer says he felt pressured to get the submersible ready
item.description: The lead engineer for an experimental submersible that imploded en route to the wreck of the Titanic testified Monday that he felt pressured to get the vessel ready to dive and refused to pilot it for a journey several years earlier.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and LISA J. ADAMS WAGNER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fiscal Service using death data to reduce improper payments
item.description: Tim Gribben, the commissioner of the Bureau of the Fiscal Service, said the bureau refined and reframed its progress statement for the first time since 2018. The post Fiscal Service using death data to reduce improper payments first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation
